content.query:
--DROP EXTERNAL TABLE M3.OOADRE
CREATE VIEW M3.OOADRE AS 
SELECT * FROM M3.OOADRE_PAR
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM M3.OOADRE_ARC

-- DROP VIEW M3.OOADRE_ARC AS
CREATE VIEW M3.OOADRE_ARC AS 
SELECT 
	CONVERT(bigint,[CONO]) [CONO],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[DIVI]) [DIVI],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[ORNO]) [ORNO],
	CONVERT(bigint,[ADRT]) [ADRT],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[ADID]) [ADID],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[CUNM]) [CUNM],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[CUA1]) [CUA1],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[CUA2]) [CUA2],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[CUA3]) [CUA3],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[CUA4]) [CUA4],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[PONO]) [PONO],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[PHNO]) [PHNO],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[TFNO]) [TFNO],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[YREF]) [YREF],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[MEAL]) [MEAL],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[CSCD]) [CSCD],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[VRNO]) [VRNO],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[EDES]) [EDES],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[ROUT]) [ROUT],
	CONVERT(bigint,[RODN]) [RODN],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[ULZO]) [ULZO],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[ECF1]) [ECF1],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[ECF2]) [ECF2],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[ECF3]) [ECF3],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[ECF4]) [ECF4],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[ECF5]) [ECF5],
	CONVERT(bigint,[GEOC]) [GEOC],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[TAXC]) [TAXC],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[ECAR]) [ECAR],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[HAFE]) [HAFE],
	CONVERT(bigint,[TXID]) [TXID],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[DLSP]) [DLSP],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[DSTX]) [DSTX],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[MODL]) [MODL],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[TEDL]) [TEDL],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[TEL2]) [TEL2],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[TOWN]) [TOWN],
	CONVERT(date,[RGDT]) [RGDT],
	CONVERT(bigint,[RGTM]) [RGTM],
	CONVERT(date,[LMDT]) [LMDT],
	CONVERT(bigint,[CHNO]) [CHNO],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[CHID]) [CHID],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[ADVI]) [ADVI],
	CONVERT(bigint,[BOP1]) [BOP1],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[FRCO]) [FRCO],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[SPLE]) [SPLE],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[RASN]) [RASN]
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/M3P/OOADRE_ARC.parquet',
        FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
    ) AS [result]
